device_name: ACUSON Sequoia Diagnostic Ultrasound System; ACUSON Sequoia Select Diagnostic Ultrasound System; ACUSON Origin Diagnostic Ultrasound System; ACUSON Origin ICE Diagnostic Ultrasound System
intended_use: The ACUSON Sequoia and Sequoia Select ultrasound imaging systems are intended to provide images of, or signals from, inside the body by an appropriately trained healthcare professional in a clinical s
intended_use_full: The ACUSON Sequoia and Sequoia Select ultrasound imaging systems are intended to provide images of, or signals from, inside the body by an appropriately trained healthcare professional in a clinical setting for the following applications: Fetal, Abdominal, Pediatric, Neonatal Cephalic, Small Parts, OB/GYN (useful for visualization of the ovaries, follicles, uterus and other pelvic structures), Cardiac, Transesophageal, Pelvic, Vascular, Adult Cephalic, Musculoskeletal and Peripheral Vascular applications.
target_condition: Hepatic steatosis (via UDFF measurement tool); various abdominal pathologies; cardiac structural assessment
ground_truth: AI Abdomen: View labels associated at time of imaging via system protocol; measurements provided by three registered Clinical Sonographers with ARDMS accreditation with at least 3 years experience. Trace AI: Ground truth measurements provided by three registered Clinical Sonographers with ARDMS accreditation with at least 3 years experience; sonographers independently refined initial circles and annotations.
other_metrics: AI Abdomen: Individual Equivalence Coefficient (IEC) fell below prespecified success criterion of 0.25 for all 12 measurements. Trace AI: 90th percentile DICE coefficient lower 90% confidence bound of 0.95, exceeding requirement of 0.8.
